title: Macherey-Nagel Nucleospin 96 Food protocol for bee pollen
steps: UV sterilize supplies for 2 96 well plates worth of extractions: 4 50mL centrifuge tubes, 2 15mL centrifuge tubes, zirconia beads, 2 96 deep well plates and clear strip caps, 2 s-blocks, 2 96 well elution plates, 14 1000uL tip boxes, 2 200uL tip boxes, 2 10uL tip boxes, 6 reagent troughs, and 6 96 well microplates
Aliquot Lysis Buffer CF Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740946 into sterile centrifuge tube and warm in 65 °C water bath. You will need to aliquot 30 mL per 1/2 plate (48 samples)
Add 540 µL Proteinase K Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740506 to each warmed 30 mL Lysis Buffer CF Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740946 aliquot and invert gently to mix

Add 560 µL Lysis Buffer CF Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740946 + Proteinase K Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740506 solution to each sample Each sample will receive 550 µL Lysis Buffer CF Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740946 and 10 µL Proteinase K Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740506

Place in tissue lyser and run at 10 Hz for 00:01:00 Make sure pollen ball is removed from bee leg after lysing. If still attached, repeat this step, increasing Hz if needed TissueLyser II (Bead Mill, QIAGEN, 85300, https://www.qiagen.com/us/products/human-id-and-forensics/automation/tissuelyser-ii/#orderinginformation )
Centrifuge 3220 x g, °C, 1 minute Eppendorf™ 5810R Centrifuge (Centrifuge, Eppendorf, 02-262-8187, https://www.fishersci.com/shop/products/eppendorf-5810r-centrifuge-rotor-packages-16/022628187 )

Using sterile tweezers, remove bee leg, rinse with 200 proof ethanol, and place leg into labeled sterile microcentrifuge tube. Sterilize tweezers between each use with flame. Leave leg tubes open in fume hood until remaining ethanol has evaporated, then store at -80 °C If extracting pollen not attached to bee leg, skip steps 5-7
Add ~ 100 µL zirconia beads to each pollen sample

Place in tissue lyser and run at 24 Hz for 00:01:30 , rotate plates 180 degrees, and lyse again at 24 Hz for 00:01:30 TissueLyser II (Bead Mill, QIAGEN, 85300, https://www.qiagen.com/us/products/human-id-and-forensics/automation/tissuelyser-ii/#orderinginformation )
Place in 65 °C water bath for 00:30:00 Incubation time may be increased up to overnight if extraction of DNA from pollen during lysis was not sufficient
Centrifuge 3220 x g, °C, 35 minutes
Transfer 300 µL of supernatant into 96 deep well plate Samples may be stored at -20 °C after this step

Add 300 µL (or equal volume) Binding Buffer C4 Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740366.250 and 300 µL (or equal volume) 200 proof ethanol Binding Buffer C4 Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740366.250 and ethanol may be combined ahead of time. Check note on reagent bottle. If already combined, add 600 µL Binding Buffer C4 Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740366.250 /EtOH solution. Binding Buffer C4 Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740366.250 with EtOH added may be stored at room temperature for up to 1 month Binding Buffer C4 Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740366.250 contains guanidine salt - do not mix with bleach
Vortex samples until thoroughly combined
Centrifuge 1500 x g, °C, for 00:00:30 Do not centrifuge at a higher g-force or for a longer duration - this will precipitate out DNA
Place food binding plate onto s-block and transfer sample to food binding plate. Seal with gas-permeable foil
Centrifuge 3220 x g, °C, 9 minutes , discard flowthrough
While centrifuging, aliquot out 12 mL per plate of Elution Buffer CE Macherey-Nagal and place in 70 °C water bath
Add 500 µL Wash Buffer CQW Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740313.125 and seal Wash Buffer CQW Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740313.125 contains guanidine salt - do not mix with bleach
Centrifuge 3220 x g, °C, 4 minutes , discard flowthrough
Add 900 µL Wash Buffer C5 Macherey-Nagal Catalog #740931 , do not seal
Centrifuge 3220 x g, °C, 20 minutes , discard flowthrough
Incubate binding plate 37 °C for 00:30:00
Place binding plate over elution block. Add 100 µL pre-heated Elution Buffer CE Macherey-Nagal directly onto center of each binding plate filter membrane
Incubate room temperature 00:05:00
Centrifuge 3220 x g, °C, 4 minutes
Aliquot entirety of product into 3 96 well microplates per DNA plate
Store at -20 °C (short term) to -80 °C (long term)
creator: Jocelynz
